name: player_pff_unit range year_offset renders the most-recent season's value (not an aggregate)
description: PFF unit is varchar metadata; SUM(varchar) errors and AVG is undefined. A range year_offset renders the latest in-window season's value via ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 1.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT pff_player_seasonlogs.unit FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) ORDER BY pff_player_seasonlogs.year DESC LIMIT 1) AS "pff_unit_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
